{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Underlord Remnant
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|An [[Underlord Remnant]] can be released from a [[void key]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
